summary: The diff implements a substantial portion of the Sparkling platform including splash screen, login, registration flows, dashboards, discovery, marketplace, notifications, ratings, banners, government contracts, and design system. However, several backend requirements are purely frontend/mock implementations with no real backend persistence, and certain specific acceptance criteria are not fully satisfied.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend validates credentials and returns a role-scoped session token; Login button routes to the correct role-specific dashboard based on backend validation
missing_requirements.reason: The backend main.mo has no login/authentication logic, no credential validation, and no session token issuance. The login page appears to be frontend-only with no backend credential check.

missing_requirements.requirement: Registered user data is persisted in the backend with correct role assignment; location stored in backend
missing_requirements.reason: While backend/main.mo has a saveCallerUserProfile function with location field, the Register page file was omitted from the diff and there is no evidence the registration form calls the backend to persist data.

missing_requirements.requirement: Document uploads stored securely; submitted electrician profile saved with status pending_verification in backend; electrician does not appear in customer search results while pending
missing_requirements.reason: The backend has no electrician-specific data model, no pending_verification status field, no document storage for electrician documents, and no filtering logic to exclude unverified electricians.

missing_requirements.requirement: Overview metric cards display real data from backend; Electrician verification queue with approve/reject that changes status in backend; Revenue tracker shows real commission data; Notification broadcaster sends in-app notifications by role/location
missing_requirements.reason: The backend has no metrics, no revenue tracking, no commission records, and no electrician verification status management beyond basic approval state.

missing_requirements.requirement: Payment panel shows per-electrician earnings and commission breakdown from backend; Performance metrics from backend
missing_requirements.reason: Backend has no earnings, commission, or performance metrics data structures.

missing_requirements.requirement: Discovery page shows only verified electricians enforced by backend; electricians grouped and sorted by proximity to selected location
missing_requirements.reason: Backend has no electrician listings, no verification status filtering, and no location/proximity sorting logic. The constraint that unverified electricians must never appear cannot be enforced without backend support.

missing_requirements.requirement: Average rating computed and stored per electrician in backend; electricians below 2.0 rating flagged in admin dashboard via backend; discovery results sorted by rating from backend
missing_requirements.reason: Backend has no rating storage, no average computation, and no flagging mechanism for low-rated electricians.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend stores electrician-to-category mappings; service categories defined in backend
missing_requirements.reason: Backend main.mo has no service category definitions or electrician-to-category mapping structures.

missing_requirements.requirement: Products persisted in backend; Super Admin can create, edit, and delete products via backend
missing_requirements.reason: Backend has no product catalog and no product CRUD operations. Cart is frontend-only via CartContext.

missing_requirements.requirement: Contract listings, applications, and status tracking persisted in backend; admin can award/reject applications via backend
missing_requirements.reason: Backend has no government contract data model and no application tracking structures.

missing_requirements.requirement: Banners uploaded and managed by Super Admin via backend; only active banners matching user location shown enforced by backend; location targeting stored in backend
missing_requirements.reason: Backend has no banner storage. BannerCarousel uses hardcoded DEMO_BANNERS with no backend integration and no location-targeted filtering from backend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend persists notifications per user and returns unread count
missing_requirements.reason: NotificationContext uses frontend-only demo data with no backend persistence. Backend has no notification storage or per-user notification retrieval.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each completed booking creates a transaction record in backend with amount, commission, and net payout; commission rate configurable by Super Admin in backend; contractor bulk commission rate of 8% tracked separately
missing_requirements.reason: Backend has no transaction records, no commission configuration, and no booking completion flow. EarningsPanel uses hardcoded DEMO_TRANSACTIONS.

missing_requirements.requirement: Availability toggle updates electrician online status in backend; jobs section lists real bookings from backend; earnings from backend
missing_requirements.reason: Backend has no online status field, no booking records, and no earnings data structures.

missing_requirements.requirement: All views are responsive and usable on mobile screen widths including dashboard sidebar navigation
missing_requirements.reason: Sidebar component is hidden on small screens with hidden lg:flex and no mobile drawer alternative is visible in the diff, which may fail mobile responsiveness for dashboard navigation.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication integration with AuthClient, DelegationIdentity, and actor-based backend calls
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a role-based login with email/password credentials and demo pre-filled fields. The implementation uses Internet Computer Internet Identity protocol which was not requested and conflicts with the email/password login requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Secret admin token initialization via URL parameter caffeineAdminToken
hallucinated_features.reason: No such secret token mechanism was requested in the build spec. This is an implementation-specific scaffolding feature not part of the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: MixinAuthorization and MixinStorage actor mixins with blob storage in backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify these mixin patterns or a generic blob storage mixin architecture. Backend requirements concern user profiles, electrician data, bookings, and transactions.

hallucinated_features.description: Generic UserApproval module for any Principal separate from electrician verification
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies electrician-specific verification with pending_verification/verified/rejected statuses tied to electrician profiles. A generic approval module for any Principal was not requested.
